name: The Dragonhood
short_description: The Dragonhood is a clicker RPG with roguelite elements and automatic battles. Collect eggs, hatch dragons, and loot stuff on a variety of 1 vs 1 adventures or 3 vs 3 dungeons. Complete quests and build your dragons the way you want with various evolutions, abilities, amulets, and more!
detailed_description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD


About the Game

Collect and hatch eggs. Delegate dragons on epic expeditions on which they will fight an auto battle for loot and goodies. Build your dragons with diverse evolutions, perks, amulets, and more!
Complete quests to unlock new features. Participate in 3 vs 3 battles during dungeons, designed with roguelite mode in mind, for the best loot possible. Increase the number of dragons to optimize your income and progress. Take your time to max out amulets in the blacksmith, manage funds carefully to avoid inflation, collect all the collectables to fulfill your gallery.

WATCH YOUR DRAGONS FIGHT ON YOUR COMMAND

Your dragons will battle on variety of adventures and dungeons. Train and upgrade them for the toughest challenges!

COLLECT AND EQUIP AMULETS

Choose from over 50 amulets to create a unique path for your dragon. Take the highest quality ones to become a real raid boss.

HATCH AND UPGRADE

Discover 30+ dragons, with some evolving into 26 unique forms and upgrade their TIER to unlock new dragon upgrades!

CHOSE YOUR PLAYSTYLE

Each dragon has a unique perk tree to suit various playstyles and counterplay enemies. Discover over 100 unique effects!



DUNGEONS & DRAGONS

Dungeons is a key feature in the game which builds up whole progress and adds roguelite element to the game. Progress through dungeon and defeat enemies to draft your special dungeon abilities and collect passive bonuses. Each dungeon in the game has its main unique boss and some unique features, be aware!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
